name: bandit.extortion_first_demand_pay_mcw
description: Bandit shakedown/toll-control regression: resume the McWilliams/Basecamp local-contact fixture, prove the bandit-only Pay/Fight demand surface, choose Pay, and prove Pay opens the actual NPC trade UI / trade window with a demanded Pay: debt before any hidden surrender.

steps.label: post_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the McWilliams bandit local-contact fixture before toll-control proof begins; this is startup/load footing only

steps.label: advance_299_turns_to_gate_edge
steps.expected_immediate_state: bounded turn advance reaches the shakedown gate edge; proof is deferred to the same-run demand-surface artifact after the final turn

steps.label: advance_final_turn_to_first_shakedown
steps.expected_visible_fact: Bandit shakedown dialogue window is visible with the basecamp-pressure opening and player-facing Pay/Fight choices after the final local-contact turn

steps.label: audit_first_demand_surface_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not prove the bandit camp-style local gate and pay/fight shakedown surface with reachable goods and demanded toll
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log names camp_style profile, open_shakedown posture, reachable goods, demanded toll, visible Pay/Fight responses, and the NPC trade UI payment bridge

steps.label: choose_pay
steps.expected_visible_fact: Pay was selected from the visible bandit shakedown dialogue; the actual NPC trade UI / trade window is now open with Pay: debt before any hidden surrender.
steps.abort_reason: selecting Pay did not visibly open the NPC trade UI with auto-balance controls

steps.label: audit_trade_ui_opened_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not prove that choosing Pay opened the actual NPC trade API / trade window before goods were surrendered
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log names the actual NPC trade API, Pay: debt title, demanded/reachable values, pool values, and the selected bandit trader

evidence_contract.claim: ordinary bandit local contact reaches a player-visible Pay/Fight shakedown surface; choosing Pay opens the actual NPC trade UI / trade window with a demanded Pay: debt before any hidden surrender
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for shakedown behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No shakedown/toll-control Pay UI credit unless startup/load, visible Pay/Fight demand surface, same-run camp_style/open_shakedown artifact, and same-run actual NPC trade-ui-open artifact are all green/matched. Successful item-dump payment remains a separate follow-up if not proven by this scenario.
